title: aria moravica
intro: Aria moravica is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is also known as White Horehound and is native to the Balkan region. Aria moravica has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to ease coughs, soothe sore throats, and promote a restful night's sleep.
